section_id: Series of 2010 - Guidelines on the Implementation of the JITCO Program - Section 1
title: Management and Implementation Responsibility of JITCO STTP
content: Following the enactment and promulgation of the amended Japan Immigration Control and Refugee Recognition Act on 15 July 2009, the effectivity of RA 10022 which amends the Migrant Workers and Overseas Filipinos Act of 1995, and the issuance of TESDA Board Resolution No. 2010-11 dated 28 June 2010, trainees sent under the TESDA-JITCO Skills and Technology Transfer Project (STTP) are considered workers under Republic Act 10022. Consequently, their deployment shall fall under the administration of the Philippine Overseas Employment Administration (POEA). Therefore, the management and implementation of the JITCO Skills and Technology Transfer Project (STTP) shall henceforth be the responsibility of the POEA.

metadata.source_file: Guidelines on the Implementation of JITCO Program.pdf
